name: Kikkoman Roasted Garlic Teriyaki Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Roasted Garlic Teriyaki Marinade and Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour marinade over chicken pieces in a zip closure bag. Squeeze out all air from the bag and securely close the top.
2. Turn the bag upside down several times to coat the chicken evenly with the marinade.
3. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours, or ideally overnight.
4. Grill the marinated chicken on medium-hot coals, positioned about 5 to 7 inches away from the heat source. Cook for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches a safe level and no longer pink in the center.
